_meta.title: ui-calendar-range — date-range mode for the calendar family (Kim intake 2026-07-07)
_meta.note: Slider-family precedent applied: shared _base engine + two thin leaves (UIRangeElement / ui-slider / ui-slider-multi). OUT of scope (follow-up, own concern): the A2UI CalendarRange catalog row + factory (SliderMulti precedent: separate row; one two-way slot per row limits it to one-way valueStart/valueEnd binds until the catalog schema grows a second slot).

nodes.label: controls/_base/calendar-element.ts — shared month-grid engine extracted from calendar.ts (shell/grid/keyboard/month-nav/date-math)
panel + nav header (prev/title/next), [data-box], idempotent #ensureShell
nodes.accept: existing calendar.test.ts anatomy assertions pass unchanged after extraction (`npm test -- calendar` exit 0, zero behavioral test edits)

nodes.label: 7-col grid: weekday header row + 6 week rows x 7 gridcell buttons, rebuild-on-month-change
nodes.accept: grid regeneration tests (month boundary, leap-Feb, DOW offset) pass unchanged post-extraction

nodes.label: pure date helpers: parseDateStr/dateStr/advanceDate/addMonths/daysInMonth + lexicographic ISO compare
nodes.accept: unit tests for isWithinRange(iso,start,end) as pure string comparison — no Date construction on the compare path (grep-provable: no `new Date(` in the predicate)

nodes.label: protected extension seams: cellState(iso) hook (per-cell flags), onPick(iso) commit hook, focus-cursor accessors (replaces #-private on the moved members)
nodes.accept: ui-calendar-range compiles against ONLY protected seams (no @ts-ignore, no reaching into privates); `npm run check` exit 0

nodes.label: controls/calendar/calendar.ts — thin single-date leaf atop base; public surface (value/min/max/name/required/disabled/size, change+select, descriptor) UNCHANGED
nodes.accept: full existing calendar jsdom + browser suites green with zero test edits; calendar.md descriptor diff = none; marginal size gate unchanged within noise

nodes.label: props: valueStart/valueEnd (attrs value-start/value-end, reflect) + min/max/size + formProps spread
nodes.accept: contract<->props trip-wire green; attributes-as-API round-trip test (set attr -> prop, set prop -> attr) passes

nodes.label: pick state machine: idle -> selecting-end -> complete; earlier-than-start pick restarts start (MD3); same-day pick = single-day range; pick on complete range starts a new one
nodes.accept: jsdom tests cover all 4 transitions + click and Enter/Space parity; disabled/out-of-range pick is a no-op

nodes.label: in-progress band preview: hover + keyboard-cursor cells between pending start and candidate end marked data-in-range
nodes.accept: jsdom test: with pending start, pointerover/focus-cursor on a later cell marks the interior cells data-in-range; leaving clears

nodes.label: form seams: formValue()=FormData 2 entries under `name` (complete pair only; half-open/inverted -> null), formValidity (valueMissing/half-open/inverted/min-max), formReset, formStateRestore of the pair
nodes.accept: jsdom: form submission yields exactly 2 same-name entries when complete, 0 when half-open; validity flags per enumerated case; reset restores authored attrs

nodes.label: visually-hidden aria-live=polite status region: announces 'start set — choose an end date' / 'range set'
nodes.accept: jsdom: status text updates on each state transition; region is in the a11y tree (not display:none)

nodes.label: calendar-range.css — endpoints reuse selected-fill circles; interior [data-in-range] square wash; WHCM leg (band=Highlight/HighlightText, today ring stays ButtonText-inset)
nodes.accept: browser test: endpoint vs interior computed backgrounds differ; forced-colors screenshot/probe keeps 4 states distinct (focus-outside / band-fill / today-inset / disabled GrayText)

nodes.label: unreserve --ui-calendar-range-fill/-ink (calendar.css line-71 reservation): alias --md-sys-color-primary-surface / -primary-on-surface (AA pair; tokens seat verifies)
nodes.accept: tokens resolve in both schemes; contrast probe: range-ink on range-fill >= 4.5:1 in light AND dark

nodes.label: calendar-range.md descriptor (frontmatter mirrors props; keyboard/aria/forcedColors sections) + site page
nodes.accept: validateComponentDescriptor green; descriptor trip-wire test green; site nav/coverage gates green

nodes.label: family barrel + BASE_CLASSES + per-control exports entry + leave-one-out marginal (ADR-0080) + manual `npm run size`
nodes.accept: barrels drift gate green; new ./controls/calendar-range export resolves; marginal <= cap or a cited pinned override

actions.label: pick a start date (click / Enter / Space)
pick an end date, completing the range
picking earlier than the pending start restarts the range at the new date
preview the in-progress band while choosing the end (hover + keyboard cursor)
render the committed interior fill between the endpoints ('days inside selection filled')
2D grid keyboard navigation incl. month-boundary regeneration (existing model, must survive extraction)
prev/next month navigation with focus-cursor clamp (existing)
decide 'is this day inside [start,end]' timezone-safely (lexicographic zero-padded ISO compare — no Date parsing)
contribute the pair to form submission (two entries under one name; nothing when incomplete)
report validity: required-empty, half-open, inverted (start>end via programmatic set), min/max per endpoint
formReset to authored attrs; formStateRestore of a serialized pair
emit select per endpoint pick; change only on range completion (drives valueStart/valueEnd binds)
single-date ui-calendar behavior + A2UI Calendar catalog row remain byte/behavior-identical (regression obligation of the extraction)
expose the engine to a second leaf without duplicating grid/keyboard/date-math machinery
tree-shakably shipped: import calendar-range drags base+range only, not text-field/overlay

edges.why: the thin leaf re-implements atop the extracted engine; single-date regression suite is the extraction's gate
range consumes the protected seams (cellState/onPick/cursor) the extraction creates
range work starts only after the extraction is proven behavior-identical (a-single-unchanged green) — otherwise a range bug and an extraction bug are indistinguishable
the CSS targets the data attributes (data-in-range / data-range-start / data-range-end) the leaf stamps
the styles alias --ui-calendar-range-fill/-ink; tokens must exist for the AA contrast probe to measure real values
the descriptor frontmatter mirrors the implemented props (trip-wire targets the built surface)
the barrel/size pass measures the complete control (ts+css); measuring before styling lands under-reports the marginal
site page + nav/coverage gates in the integration slice consume the descriptor
